metaData.Key Information:
• 100% naturally-derived cleaning agents
• Kills 99.9% bacteria
• Effectively removes food grease and stains
• Gentle to use on dining areas, baby items, electrical appliances, etc
metaData.Preparation:
1. Open the pack by peeling the resealable adhesive label
2. Pull out a piece of natural plant-based surface sheet and reseal label
3. Wipe directly on usage areas, and leave it to dry
4. Dispose the used sheet.
metaData.Storage Information: Avoid exposure of Wipes to direct sunlight

metaData.Ingredients: Sodium Hypochlorite, Alkyl Amine Oxide, Sodium Hydroxide
metaData.Key Information:
• For bathroom use
• No scrub formula
• Eliminates stubborn stains & mould
• Kills germs & bacteria • Extra shine
metaData.Preparation:
Directions for use:
1. Turn safety stopper and align with "foam" marking at tip of nozzle with groove in the centre of yellow strip
2. Hold bottle 10cm away from mold stains. Squeeze and release lever to dispense solution
3. Rinse thoroughly with water after a few minutes
4. After use, align the safety stopper tip with "closed" marking. Be sure to wash your hands after use
metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE BATHROOM STAIN & MOLD REMOVER REFILL 2S 520ML
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away fro direct sunlight and heat

metaData.Ingredients: Purified Water (Aqua), Sodium Citrate, Alcohol, Propylene Glycol, Sucrose Laurate, Potassium Carbonate, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Perfume
metaData.Key Information:
• Kills 99.9% of bacteria
• Made from 100% food grade (edible) ingredients
• Removes even the toughest formula stains and yet gentle on skin
• Safely cleans baby accessories, toys, fruit and vegetables
metaData.Preparation:
1. Clean feeding bottles, nipples / teats, etc by pouring the cleanser directly onto the washing storage
2. After washing, rinse the feeding bottles, nipples/teats, toys and accessories with running water for about 5 seconds
• For fruits and vegetables: Rinse with water for at least 30 seconds
• For rinsing in a basin: Water must be changed at least twice
metaData.Storage Information: Keep out of reach of children

product.name: Pigeon Baby Liquid Cleanser
